sentences.text: You never know which copy wins — you find out.
Always ship with a challenger: two subject lines, two headlines, two openings — real audiences decide, not opinions
Test one variable: if version B changes the headline AND the offer AND the length, the result teaches nothing.
Let AI build the matrix: "Here's the control.
Give me 5 challengers: one changes the emotional angle, one the specificity, one the length, one the CTA, one the opening hook"
